channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « Cet appareil a été une priorité » pourquoi Apple risque d’abandonner un projet très ambitieux
item.description: Le futur directeur général d'Apple s'apprête à hériter d'un catalogue de nouveautés particulièrement dense. Si le lancement du tout premier iPhone pliable semble acquis pour le mois de septembre, le projet de tablette géante à écran flexible risque fort de ne jamais dépasser le stade du simple prototype expérimental.

item.title: The Man Behind AlphaGo Thinks AI Is Taking the Wrong Path
item.description: David Silver has a new billion-dollar company that aims to build AI “superlearners.”

item.title: That UL safety logo is a lot more complicated than it looks
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Jennifer Scanlon, who is the CEO of UL Solutions. That’s Underwriters Laboratories – you know, the UL logo listed on all your electronics? That symbol means it’s been tested and found safe in a variety of ways. UL’s been around for 100 years. It started as a way for insurance companies […]

item.title: Course à l’IA : la Chine bloque l’acquisition de « sa » start-up Manus AI par le géant américain Meta
item.description: Le champion chinois de l'IA, Manus AI, ne passera pas dans le giron de Meta, le groupe américain aux mains de Mark Zuckerberg : ce lundi 27 avril, Pékin a annoncé avoir bloqué l'opération, une mesure qui s'inscrit dans un contexte de compétition technologique avec Washington.

item.title: The sequel to the iconic emulator ZSNES is called Super ZSNES, of course
item.description: Somehow, ZSNES has returned after laying dormant for 20 years. The developers of the iconic Super Nintendo emulator, which originally debuted in 1997 for DOS (something I distinctly remember trying to install on my ancient Intel 486 Packard Bell), are back with a sequel release dubbed Super ZSNES. And really, what else would they call it? Developers zsKnight and Demo say that Super ZSNES has been rewritten from scratch with a focus on a GPU-powered “Super Enhancement Engine,” which allows for high resolution playback, overclocking (which could help with games notorious for slowdown), widescre...

item.title: The fake Rolex problem: How AI turned amateur attackers into nation-state threats
item.description: AI-powered attackers bypass defenses by engineering intent-driven, multi-layered phishing kill chains.

item.title: Google Cloud unveils eighth-generation TPUs built to support an agentic era
item.description: TPU 8t and 8i promise mind-blowing performance and million-strong clusters to power agentic AI at scale.

item.title: Amazon snaps up Oprah Winfrey’s podcast
item.description: Oprah Winfrey's video podcast, Book Club, and Favorite Things are headed to Amazon, according to reports from The New York Times and Variety. Starting in July, The Oprah Podcast will get new episodes twice per week, instead of once, debuting across Amazon Prime Video, Amazon Music, Audible, and Fire TV channels. The show will still […]

item.title: La Chine tire à boulets rouges sur la future loi de l’UE qui impose un « Made in Europe »
item.description: Deux mois après la présentation officielle de son règlement visant à imposer une préférence européenne dans les secteurs stratégiques, Pékin a menacé de représailles l'Europe si elle adoptait un texte décrit comme discriminatoire, et violant plusieurs traités internationaux dont les principes de l'OMC.

item.title: La Poste Mobile a 15 ans et offre 85 Go de plus sur son forfait phare, sans toucher au prix
item.description: À l'occasion de ses 15 ans, La Poste Mobile propose un forfait 215 Go en 5G à 10,99 euros par mois. Carte SIM offerte, sans engagement, mais une offre limitée dans le temps.

item.title: China vetoes Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
item.description: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

item.title: Iran has a proposal on the Strait of Hormuz, but it doesn’t address their nuclear program
item.description: Iran is offering to reopen the key waterway, according to anonymous sources. Iran offered to end its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz without addressing its nuclear program, officials with knowledge of the proposal said Monday.

item.title: ‘Extraction and distillation’: US State Department upgrades AI theft accusations to target China’s Deepseek, Moonshot AI and MiniMax
item.description: The State Department says Chinese AI companies are 'distilling' US AI models.

item.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
item.description: The phone could go in mass production in 2028, an analyst says.

item.title: Belkin’s Lilypad iPad case brings Toy Story 5’s newest character into the real world in the most functional way yet
item.description: Belkin has turned Toy Story 5’s Lilypad character into a movie-scale iPad case, transforming the device into a playful, character-inspired accessory.

item.title: Jensen Huang tells CEOs 'don't leave' California — Nvidia CEO says he's fine paying the ‘highest taxes in the world'
item.description: As tech CEOs flee California to avoid higher taxes, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says he doesn't mind paying.

item.title: Critical infrastructure giant Itron says it was hacked
item.description: The American technology giant provides water and energy monitoring and utility meters to hundreds of millions of homes and businesses.

item.title: Best Smart Glasses (2026): Meta, Viture, Xreal, and More
item.description: This burgeoning wearable tech category lets you talk to an AI assistant, listen to music, or check out a display screen right from the comfort of your very own face.

item.title: Gamers, it's time to get excited — the Steam Machine's price and launch date may be imminent
item.description: The memory crisis has forced Valve to delay the Steam Machine from an early 2026 launch, but rumors suggest a price and release date announcement is near.

item.title: What is the release date for Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 7 on Disney+?
item.description: Find out when the second-to-last episode of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 will air with our help.

item.title: I played an hour of Supermassive Games' highly anticipated Directive 8020 — and fans of Alien: Isolation are going to adore this
item.description: Directive 8020 arrives in May, and its combination of new features and familiarity makes it well worth the wait.

item.title: RAG precision tuning can quietly cut retrieval accuracy by 40%, putting agentic pipelines at risk
item.description: Enterprise teams that fine-tune their RAG embedding models for better precision may be unintentionally degrading the retrieval quality those pipelines depend on, according to new research from Redis.The paper, "Training for Compositional Sensitivity Reduces Dense Retrieval Generalization," tested what happens when teams train embedding models for compositional sensitivity. That is the ability to catch sentences that look nearly identical but mean something different — "the dog bit the man" versus "the man bit the dog," or a negation flip that reverses a statement's meaning entirely. That train...

item.title: Microsoft Outlook issues today: Why it’s asking for your password
item.description: Microsoft confirmed that Business and Enterprise Microsoft 365 customers were having trouble accessing the popular software on April 27.

item.title: What is Thundr? Omegles replacement, warts and all.
item.description: Thundr is a random video and text chat site that's much like Omegle, which shut down in 2023.

item.title: Roole Map se met à jour et embarque la meilleure fonction de Waze et Google Maps
item.description: L’application GPS française vient d’être mise à jour avec une nouveauté très attendue. Elle embarque désormais un système de signalements communautaires qui lui permet de véritablement rivaliser avec Waze et Google Maps.

item.title: ‘This could potentially become a fire risk’: Samsung Galaxy users warned against leaving their flashlights on accidentally, as viral TikTok shows an S25 flash burning a hole through a plastic bag
item.description: Samsung Galaxy flashlights have been branded ‘a potential fire risk’ by an expert after a viral TikTok showed one device burning a hole through a plastic bag.

item.title: Meta veut alimenter ses data centers depuis l’espace : le pari fou de l’énergie solaire en orbite
item.description: Des satellites qui captent le soleil 24 heures sur 24 et l'envoient sur des panneaux solaires terrestres après le coucher du soleil. Le projet ressemble à de la science-fiction, mais l'ancien patron de la NASA n'a jamais été aussi enthousiaste.

item.title: Euphoria Season 3s wedding was inspired by a shrimp cocktail
item.description: Though bloody, the "Euphoria" "version of the Red Wedding" actually had a very pink colour palette.

item.title: Meilleurs TV 55 pouces (140 cm) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ? (OLED, QLED, Mini-LED)
item.description: La catégorie 55 pouces reste l'un des choix les plus populaires pour les téléviseurs. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs TV de 55 pouces à tous les prix, qu'elles soient OLED, Mini LED ou LCD, mais toujours en 4K HDR.

item.title: This $89 Asus 120Hz IPS monitor is the perfect budget upgrade for your home office — and it even comes with a month of Adobe Creative Cloud free
item.description: Reliable color, smooth refresh, and built-in speakers make this 24-inch Asus display a great choice at just $89, and includes a free month of Adobe's creative software suite.

item.title: Qualcomm stock is soaring today as rumblings of an OpenAI smartphone deal emerge. Here’s what’s happening
item.description: While nothing has been confirmed, investors appear to be excited about a potential deal between the semiconductor giant and ChatGPT maker. Shares in Qualcomm Incorporated (Nasdaq: QCOM) are surging in premarket trading this morning after reports emerged that the company may be on the cusp of a deal with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI.

item.title: 5 new AI tools that actually save time
item.description: From instant document design to bulk calendar uploads and one-click YouTube analysis, these apps are worth adding to your 2026 workflow. This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps.

item.title: Got a new Samsung Galaxy A37? I've found the best cases to keep it looking scratch-free and super stylish
item.description: Sturdy and stylish Samsung Galaxy A37 cases, from reliable brands.

item.title: 'They don't care': ShinyHunters strike again as hackers claim to have pinched 7.5 million Carnival cruise emails
item.description: The biggest cruise company in the world has suffered a supply chain attack after one of its subsidiaries got hit.
